question: How do late submissions work?
final_answer:
Late submissions will be penalized at 10%, 25%, and 50% of the earned score. More than 7 days late submissions are not accepted.
Sources: [policy_late_work.md], [policy_late_work.md], [policy_late_work.md]

plan: Submissions must be received within the specified time frame.
Late submissions are penalized at 10%, 25%, and 50% of the earned score.
More than 7 days late submissions are not accepted.
Graded late work is graded normally, with deductions applied as described.
A 15-minute grace period applies to all deadlines.
